description: Use this API to determine the buffer size needed to hold the comments for the specified file. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr, length = scenariofilelengthcomments(sgroup, sfile)

parameters.name: sgroup
parameters.description: Group that contains the specified file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: sfile
parameters.description: Name of the file whose comment length is to be returned. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: length
return_values.description: Length of the scenario comment string. (output).
